name: set_renderer_color
description: Set the color of one or more GameObjects' Renderers. Creates or reuses flat color materials using 'Universal Render Pipeline/Lit' shader. Single mode: pass one game_object_name. Batch mode: pass 'objects' array with entries containing game_object_name, color_name, r, g, b, a — each can have different colors. Always prefer batch mode for 2+ objects.

color_name.description: PascalCase color name for the material asset, e.g. 'Red', 'DarkGreen'.

objects.description: Batch mode: array of objects. Each entry has game_object_name, color_name, r, g, b, a.
